---
title: "NIS2 Compliance in Germany"
title-block-style: none
description: "NIS2 compliance services for German businesses. Navigate BSI requirements under the NIS2UmsuCG, meet EU cybersecurity obligations, and protect your Mittelstand organization."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #81BD4A; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:70vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/server-room-dark.jpg');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag">chen.ist</div>
    <h1>NIS2 Compliance<br>in <span style="color:#81BD4A;">Germany</span></h1>
    <p>BSI-aligned cybersecurity compliance for German enterprises and Mittelstand businesses.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/booking/" class="ev-btn">Book a consultation</a>
      <a href="#affected" class="ev-btn-ghost">Who is affected?</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- STATS BAR -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:4rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn">EUR 10M</div><div class="m-nl">Max fine (essential)</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">EUR 7M</div><div class="m-nl">Max fine (important)</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">NIS2UmsuCG</div><div class="m-nl">Implementation law</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">30,000+</div><div class="m-nl">Entities affected in DE</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- WHO IS AFFECTED -->
<div class="m-s" id="affected" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Who is affected in Germany?</h2>
    <p class="sub">Key sectors under NIS2 obligations across Europe's largest economy.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-lightning"></i><h3>Energy & Energiewende</h3><p>Utilities, grid operators, renewable energy companies, and the entire Energiewende supply chain including E.ON, RWE, and EnBW.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-car-front"></i><h3>Automotive</h3><p>OEMs (VW, BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Porsche), Tier-1 and Tier-2 suppliers, and connected vehicle infrastructure.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-gear"></i><h3>Industrie 4.0</h3><p>Smart manufacturing, industrial IoT, automation systems, and the Mittelstand companies driving German industry.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-heart-pulse"></i><h3>Healthcare</h3><p>Krankenhauser, Kassenarztliche Vereinigungen, pharmaceutical manufacturers, and medical device companies.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-bank"></i><h3>Banking & Finance</h3><p>BaFin-regulated institutions, Deutsche Bundesbank-connected systems, commercial banks, and fintech companies.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-train-front"></i><h3>Transport</h3><p>Deutsche Bahn, regional operators, airports (Fraport, Munich, BER), logistics companies, and shipping operators.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-hdd-network"></i><h3>Digital Infrastructure</h3><p>Frankfurt's data center hub (DE-CIX), cloud providers, telecom operators (Telekom, Vodafone), and DNS services.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-building"></i><h3>Public Administration</h3><p>Federal and Lander government entities, municipal IT services, and public digital infrastructure providers.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- BSI AUTHORITY -->
<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="BSI cybersecurity compliance Germany"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>The supervisory authority:<br>BSI.</h2>
        <p>In Germany, the <strong>BSI (Bundesamt fur Sicherheit in der Informationstechnik)</strong> — the Federal Office for Information Security — is the central authority for NIS2 enforcement. BSI sets technical standards, conducts audits, and has the power to impose significant penalties on non-compliant organizations.</p>
        <p>Germany implements NIS2 through the <strong>NIS2UmsuCG (NIS-2-Umsetzungs- und Cybersicherheitsstarkungsgesetz)</strong>, which amends the existing BSI-Gesetz. This implementation law significantly expands the scope of regulated entities — from approximately 2,000 under the previous KRITIS framework to an estimated 30,000 organizations. Requirements include mandatory risk management, 24-hour incident reporting, supply chain security, and personal liability for management bodies.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/services/nis2/" class="m-lk">View NIS2 requirements</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- LOCAL CREDIBILITY -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r rv">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/team-overhead.webp" alt="chen.ist working with German businesses"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>We understand<br>Germany.</h2>
        <p>Germany's economy is the largest in the EU, and NIS2 hits it harder than any other member state. The expansion from KRITIS to NIS2 means tens of thousands of <strong>Mittelstand</strong> companies — many of them world-class manufacturers and hidden champions — now face cybersecurity compliance obligations for the first time.</p>
        <p>We work with German businesses to bridge the gap between BSI's technical requirements and practical implementation. Our approach respects the German emphasis on thoroughness and documentation while keeping compliance programs efficient and actionable. From automotive suppliers in Baden-Wurttemberg to fintech companies in Frankfurt, we deliver NIS2 programs that meet BSI standards without bureaucratic overhead.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/booking/" class="m-lk">Schedule a consultation</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- RELATED SERVICES -->
<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Related services</h2>
    <p class="sub">NIS2 compliance is most effective as part of a broader security strategy.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-clipboard-check"></i><h3>NIS2 Compliance</h3><p>Full NIS2 assessments, gap analysis, and CISO as a Service for essential and important entities.</p><a href="/services/nis2/" class="m-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-lock"></i><h3>GDPR Compliance</h3><p>Data protection aligned with NIS2 security requirements. Many obligations overlap — address them together.</p><a href="/services/gdpr/" class="m-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i><h3>Cybersecurity</h3><p>Blue team operations, threat hunting, and security monitoring to meet NIS2 technical requirements.</p><a href="/services/cybersecurity/" class="m-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Ready to comply<br>with NIS2 in Germany?</h2>
    <p>From KRITIS to NIS2UmsuCG — get expert guidance on meeting BSI requirements for your organization.</p>
    <a href="/booking/" class="m-b">Book a consultation</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Free initial assessment &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> BSI-aligned &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Mittelstand expertise
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
